properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, Thy Word abideth, And our footsteps guideth; Who it's truth believeth Light and joy receiveth.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When our foes are near us Then Thy Word doth cheer us, Word of consolation, Message of Salvation.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the storms are o’er us, And dark clouds before us, Then it's light directeth, And our way protecteth.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who can tell the pleasure, Who recount the treasure, By Thy Word imparted To the simple-hearted?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Word of mercy, giving, Succour to the living; Word of life, supplying Comfort to the dying.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, that we discerning Its most holy learning Lord, may love and fear Thee, Ever more be near Thee.
